title: Video Chunks Annotation Schema (metropolis-v3.0)
description: Schema for chunks_*.json - Dense temporal video chunks with captions (TAO DAFT metropolis-v3.0). Each chunk describes a consecutive segment of a video using frame numbers, with optional semantic tags.

version.description: Schema version - must be '3.0' for this schema

metadata.description: File metadata for identification and cataloging

description.description: Human-readable description of this annotation file

license.description: License under which this annotation is distributed

tags.description: Dataset-level tags for categorization and search

video_id.description: Reference to video file (matches video_id in video_*.json)

chunks.description: Ordered list of consecutive temporal video chunks. Chunks may overlap at boundaries but should not be identical in time range.

chunk_id.description: Unique identifier for this chunk within the file

start.description: Chunk start time in flexible timecode: MM:SS or HH:MM:SS with optional fractional seconds (e.g. '00:02', '00:02.70', '00:01:30')

end.description: Chunk end time in flexible timecode: MM:SS or HH:MM:SS with optional fractional seconds (e.g. '00:04', '00:04.50', '00:01:35')

description.description: Dense caption describing what happens in this temporal segment

tags.description: Semantic tags for this chunk (e.g. normal_flow, collision, aftermath)

metadata.description: Dense temporal chunks for ITS collision video

chunks.description: Traffic flows normally. A white sedan travels in lane 5, a gray sedan in lane 3.
The gray sedan initiates a left turn from lane 3, colliding with the white sedan in lane 5.
The white sedan strikes a tree on the sidewalk and stalls. The gray sedan exits the frame.
